goals.objective: Execute .omo/plans/debtor-context-graph-v0.md end-to-end. Use the plan's 15 Todos and Final Verification Wave as the source of truth. Build a deterministic debtor-context graph v0 under trustgraph_legal: schema types, OCR document assembly, route/legal resources, debtor graph builder, snapshot diff, route candidates, StopGate integration, CLI, additive MCP debtor tools, governance hooks, tests, docs, and PII-safe real OCR eval evidence. Success is all top-level plan checkboxes completed with automated tests, real CLI/fake-MCP surface evidence, PII scans, cleanup receipts, commits, and final review evidence. Do not mutate unrelated deployment files or expose raw OCR/PII.

successCriteria.scenario: Auxiliary CLI/data surface: complete every top-level checkbox in .omo/plans/debtor-context-graph-v0.md, then run /opt/homebrew/bin/python3 -m pytest tests/unit/legal_ontology/test_document_assembly.py tests/unit/legal_ontology/test_debtor_context.py tests/unit/legal_ontology/test_route_candidates.py tests/unit/legal_ontology/test_mcp_debtor_context_tools.py tests/integration/legal_ontology/test_debtor_context_pipeline.py tests/unit/legal_ontology/test_mcp_domain_tools.py tests/integration/legal_ontology/test_mcp_tools.py -q; PASS when the command exits 0 and final evidence files exist.

Adversarial safety surface: run the final PII scan and outside-root fake-MCP path probe; PASS when final-pii-scan.txt contains NO_FINDINGS and final-mcp-path-failure.json reports path_outside_repo_root without leaking the requested path or file content.
